home.title: Porto Cabral BC

dishes.title: Capitão Cabral
dishes.desc: Octopus in our signature style, creamy lemon risotto and sautéed potatoes.

dishes.title: Grilled Lobster
dishes.desc: Whole lobster in butter, gratin potatoes and shrimp sauce.

dishes.title: Porto Shrimp
dishes.desc: Giant shrimp flambéed in cognac with brie cheese.

dishes.title: Sea Treasures
dishes.desc: Lobster, shrimp, cusk or salmon, croquettes and gratin oysters.

dishes.title: Salmon au Molhe
dishes.desc: Grilled fillet in passion fruit sauce with fresh asparagus.

dishes.title: Fresh Oysters
dishes.desc: Hand-selected, served with classic vinaigrette and lemon.

home.history_title:
Our Story:
The Legacy of the Seas
home.history_p1: Founded by Edson Cabral, Porto Cabral BC was born from a visceral passion for the sea and hospitality. What began as a small family pier became the most iconic gastronomic destination of Barra Sul.
home.history_p2: Every detail — from the architecture reminiscent of old galleons to the wine curation — was designed to provide a total immersion in nautical luxury.
home.history_quote: Porto Cabral is not just a restaurant, it is my personal invitation for you to feel the soul of Balneário Camboriú.

pillars.title: Over the Sea
pillars.desc: Feel the ocean breeze and the gentle sway over the waters of Barra Sul.

pillars.title: Best Sunset
pillars.desc: The most iconic sunset in Balneário Camboriú, with a panoramic view of the skyline.

pillars.title: Fine Dining
pillars.desc: Fresh ocean ingredients and contemporary techniques that elevate every flavor.

home.location_desc: At the Molhe da Barra Sul — the most exclusive point of Balneário Camboriú, where the river meets the sea. A gastronomic experience literally over the waters.
home.reserva_sub: On the most beautiful horizon of Balneário Camboriú.
